title: epipactis latifolia var. papillosa
intro: Epipactis latifolia var. papillosa, also known as the Broad-leaved Helleborine, is a rare and lesser-known orchid species. It has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that aid in wound healing and the reduction of swelling. The health benefits of Epipactis latifolia var. papillosa include its potential to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
